creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Mark threads safe for the following ports:

comms/gnokii
comms/openobex
comms/obexapp
games/pokerth
games/traindirector

I made separate patches for each.  hope this is not inconvenient.

Tested with a 2 core machine and also with MAKE_JOBS_NUMBER=4.
